full_name: Luxurious Beachfront 3-Bedroom Apt with Sea Views

booking.response: Welcome! Check-in: 2:00 PM | Check-out: 10:00 AM | Please confirm arrival time and guest count | Instructions sent at 10 AM on arrival day

transfers.response: Airport transfers available via our partners | 10% discount at mauritiusattractions.com with code FRIDAYMU | Includes transfers, car rentals, activities

amenities.response: Direct beachfront access | Sea views from all rooms | Luxury amenities included | Full guide available via guest app link sent at booking

return_guest.response: 10% discount on next Friday Retreats stay! Book directly at fridayretreats.mu with code FRIDAY10 | We'd love to welcome you back!

complaint_patterns: Confusion about direct beach access vs building beach
Questions about which floor for sea view
things_to_avoid: Don't oversell "beachfront" — it's across the coastal road
Avoid confirming specific room view angles
operational_notes: Airport transfers available via mauritiusattractions.com code FRIDAYMU (10% discount)
Check-in instructions sent at 10 AM on arrival day
Guests often ask about snorkeling spots — recommend Flic en Flac public beach
